response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed on-screen text at the beginning of the video identifying the song "Genesis" and creators "Lyrics: Steph, Music, Arrangement: mifumei".
2. Simplified search string: "Genesis hololive English Advent lyrics".
3. Confirmed "Genesis" is an original song by "hololive English -Advent-".
4. Searched for and retrieved the full English lyrics for the song.
5. Divided the video into two scenes based on the visual change from the city to the beach.
response.global_summary: A performance video of the original song "Genesis" by hololive English -Advent-. The video features the group in two distinct settings: a city street and a tropical beach.

scenes.description: The group performs "Genesis" on a city street, with the song title and credits displayed at the beginning.
The group continues their performance of "Genesis" on a beach setting.
